name: softpowers
description: A human-led software development workflow for coding agents: planning, TDD, debugging, review, and verification without silent over-delegation.

interface.shortDescription: Human-led planning, TDD, debugging, review, and verification workflows
interface.longDescription: Use Softpowers to guide Codex through human-led software workflows: lightweight task handling, brainstorming, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, code review, verification, and explicit delegation when useful.
defaultPrompt: Review this branch before I merge it.
